title: boerhavia spicata
intro: Boerhavia spicata, also known as the redspike hogweed or redspike desert-hogweed, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Nyctaginaceae family. Traditionally, it is used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects, which help to treat a variety of health issues. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate symptoms of respiratory and urinary tract infections, and manage conditions such as diabetes and hypertension. Boerhavia spicata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine.
